coding.system_rules: CRITICAL CODE RULES: All LangGraph node functions are SYNC (def). Use _run_async() to call async functions. NEVER use raw await in sync def. Check function signatures to know which are async vs sync.
coding.evaluator_prompt_extra: Focus on correctness, not style. PASS if the change is functionally correct, passes syntax check, and doesn't break existing behavior — even if you'd write it differently. Reject only for actual bugs, missing imports, type errors, or logic regressions.

general.description: RFP and prose output quality improvements
general.system_rules: Focus on RFP output quality: section completeness, prose clarity, requirement coverage. Evaluate whether changes improve the quality of generated RFP responses.

research.system_rules: Focus on research pipeline quality: long-context handling, source synthesis, citation accuracy. Evaluate whether changes improve research output depth and correctness.
